dimensions.name: completeness
dimensions.description: All required sections present with substantive content
criteria: All 9 sections present (summary, abstract, framework, research_question, methods, results, innovations, limitations, references)
Each section has 3+ sentences of substantive content (not stubs or placeholders)
Key experimental parameters listed when applicable

dimensions.name: specificity
criteria: Numerical data present in results (measurements, percentages, comparisons)
Method descriptions include concrete details (equipment, concentrations, protocols)
Parameters section has specific values with units
No vague statements like 'good results' without quantification

dimensions.name: clarity
criteria: Summary gives a complete picture in 3-5 sentences
Technical terms explained on first use (especially for Chinese output)
Logical flow from problem → method → results → implications
Sections are self-contained and don't repeat each other excessively

dimensions.name: insight
dimensions.description: Depth of analysis beyond surface-level extraction
criteria: Innovations identify genuine novelty (not just 'we did X')
Limitations are specific and actionable (not generic 'more work needed')
Research question explains WHY the problem matters
Framework reveals the logical structure, not just a list of steps
